task_completion.description: Load the baseline rocket design into OpenRocket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application window is open, and the title bar or component tree indicates that 'srad_start.ork' (or the baseline rocket) is loaded.

task_completion.description: Load the custom thrust curve file into OpenRocket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog in OpenRocket (such as Preferences -> Thrust curves or a motor loading window) shows the custom motor file path '/home/ga/Documents/motors/SRAD_C40.eng' being added or listed.

task_completion.description: Configure the motor mount to use the custom motor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Motors & Configuration' tab in OpenRocket shows the motor 'SRAD_C40' (Manufacturer: 'SRAD_Team') assigned to a motor mount on the rocket.

task_completion.description: Run a flight simulation with the new motor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket shows a completed simulation run, with calculated metrics such as Apogee and Max Velocity visible in the table.

task_completion.description: Save the modified rocket design to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/srad_simulated_rocket.ork', or the OpenRocket window title bar updates to show 'srad_simulated_rocket.ork'.

task_completion.description: Document the simulated Apogee and Maximum Velocity in a text report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the creation of '/home/ga/Documents/exports/srad_flight_report.txt' containing numeric values for Apogee (meters) and Maximum Velocity (m/s).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenRocket GUI to run the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the OpenRocket GUI being interacted with to configure the motor and run the simulation, rather than the agent attempting to manually edit the .ork XML file to fake a simulation.

integrity.description: Verify the reported metrics match the actual simulation results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Apogee and Maximum Velocity values written to the text report must exactly match or closely round to the values displayed in the OpenRocket 'Flight simulations' tab.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not hallucinate the report values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must view the completed simulation results in OpenRocket before writing the values to the text report.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom motor file is located at '/home/ga/Documents/motors/SRAD_C40.eng'. The motor manufacturer is 'SRAD_Team' and the designation is 'SRAD_C40'. The baseline rocket is '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/srad_start.ork'. The final rocket design must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/srad_simulated_rocket.ork'. The flight report must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/srad_flight_report.txt' and contain the simulated Apogee and Maximum Velocity.
